text.title: rag-eval-generation-metrics Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-eval-generation-metrics application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all three RAG Triad metrics needed for this evaluation?

branch.conclusion: Run full Triad with the fixed judge.
Sample 10-20% and run Triad on the sample.
Skip generation metrics; rely on retrieval metrics only.

example.description: Pre-launch evaluation runs the full Triad on the entire eval set.
